title: White Plastic & Metal Tape Measure Roll, 150 cm - Dual Sided with Centimeter & Inch Scale, Essential Sewing Kit Accessory
features: DUAL MEASUREMENT SCALES: This tape measure features both centimetre and inch scales, allowing for easy measurements in either unit. Perfect for a variety of sewing needs.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from durable white plastic and metal, this tape measure is built to last and withstand the rigors of daily use.
LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: Designed with portability in mind, this tape measure is lightweight and easy to carry, ensuring it's always on hand whenever you need it.

ESSENTIAL SEWING ACCESSORY: With a length of 150cm, this tape measure is ideal for tailors, seamstresses, craftspeople, and DIY enthusiasts alike. It's a versatile tool that allows for precise measurements and ensures your projects turn out just right.

SUITABLE FOR ALL SKILL LEVELS: Whether you're a beginner or an experienced seamstress, this dual-scale tape measure is easy to use and perfect for all skill levels. It's also a great teaching tool for children who are learning how to sew.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality tape measure is designed with a large number in black font in white tape with a centimeter and an inch measurement scale. Identified the measurement easily Safety Warning No warning applicable
